title: Implement Artifact first
reason: Artifact is the shared base for attachments, outputs, downloads and signed storage, reducing downstream coupling.

title: Implement Chat mock adapter first
reason: Chat still depends on artifact storage and would force placeholder flows.

title: Implement RAG mock adapter first
reason: RAG adds value later, but safe grounding still needs the artifact base and server-side secrets policy.

title: Implement Designer mock adapter first
reason: Designer depends on Artifact plus chat/RAG semantics and would create public-output pressure too early.

title: Stay contract-only and harden security first
reason: Useful if validation failed, but the current evidence is enough to choose a safe first implementation.

title: No-go; rework migration framing
reason: Reserved for ambiguous or unsafe evidence; current reports are sufficiently aligned to avoid this path.
